jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Testbook
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
